# Blob size allowlist
#
# Paths listed here are exempt from the Git blob size limit (default 5 MB).
# Only add entries for intentionally large, checked-in assets such as
# vendor snapshots, test fixtures, or platform-specific binaries.
#
# Format: glob pattern

# Prebuilt V8 static libraries (bundled from rusty_v8 releases)
third_party/v8/prebuilt/*.a
third_party/v8/prebuilt/*.lib

# Test fixtures — large sample datasets
tests/fixtures/**/*.bin
tests/fixtures/**/*.zst

# Vendor snapshots of third-party dependencies (pinned for hermetic builds)
vendor/**/*.tar.gz

# Platform-specific Wine binaries for cross-platform testing
third_party/wine/bin/*
third_party/wine/lib/**/*.so
third_party/wine/lib64/**/*.so

# Platform-specific PowerShell binaries
third_party/powershell/pwsh.exe
third_party/powershell/**/*.dll

# Documentation assets (diagrams, screenshots)
docs/assets/**/*.png
docs/assets/**/*.pdf

# Model files used in integration tests
tests/models/**/*.gguf
